name: @clearline/domain-payments
description: Pure, framework-agnostic vendor-payment rules — the single validatePayment gate (balance, daily limit, self-transfer, recipient status), payment-status normalization (unrecognized → neutral 'processing'), client-side idempotency-key minting (UUID v4), and full-jitter retry backoff. No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/auth.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-004 (US-CW-007 Vendor Payment Submission & Idempotency, US-CW-008 Payment Validation, Limits & Recipient Checks, US-CW-009 Payment Compliance Holds, Reversals & Status Handling).
